markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Tampa Bay and Kansas City tie in the first 7 innings of the Tampa Bay vs Kansas City professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026 at 7:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market refers to the first 7 innings of the Tampa Bay vs Kansas City professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 2, 2026 at 7:40 PM EDT. If the score at the end of the first 7 innings is tied, the "Tie" strike will resolve to Yes and all team strikes will resolve to No. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days).
markets.title: Tampa Bay vs Kansas City first 7 innings tie?
